description: Beyond the Veil Patch 7 (29 March 2023) — Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements

items.text: "Select / Unselect All" button added to "Loadouts" section of Marketplace UI
Streamlined and improved guild logo creation
Added item icons to tooltips of harvestables
[DESKTOP] Minimap can now be collapsed and re-expanded in main HUD (already implemented on mobile)
[MOBILE] Map tooltips now offset from point of touch
[ALBION EAST] System-provided Carrot Soups and Mules removed from Marketplaces
[REFERRALS] Referral seasons are now one month long (previously two) and may include older skins - see this forum post for details: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/178077

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Breakthrough (Daybreaker) Now purges before dealing damage

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Gives immunity to Cast Disruption (i.e. channel or cast durations being affected by damage)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat) Buff Duration: 5s → 7s Gives immunity to Cast Disruption (i.e. channel or cast durations being affected by damage)

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: Can now be cast on self

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Dynamic Defense (Jacket of Tenacity) Can now be cast on self

subsections.heading: Battlemount Abilities

subitems.text: DoT Damage vs Players per stack: 10% → 8%

stats.name: DoT Damage vs Players per stack

subitems.text: No longer purges or applies direct damage
Applies an Oil Flame Charge to each enemy hit
Casting now dissolves all ally Smokescreen areas in a 30m radius

subsections.searchable_text: Battlemount Abilities Pierce Through (Siege Ballista) Cast Time: 2s → 0.5s Artillery Fire (Behemoth) Max Stack: 3 → 5 DoT Damage vs Players per stack: 10% → 8% Flamboyant Defense (Behemoth) No longer purges or applies direct damage Applies an Oil Flame Charge to each enemy hit Smokescreen (Behemoth) Casting now dissolves all ally Smokescreen areas in a 30m radius

subsections.heading: New Max Health:
subsections.searchable_text: New Max Health: Battle Rhino Crystal: 6644 → 7973 Silver: 5913 → 4731 Bronze: 5578 → 3347 Tower Chariot Crystal: 10061 → 12073 Silver: 8954 → 7163 Battle Eagle Crystal: 6075 → 7289 Silver: 5406 → 4325 Colossus Beetle Crystal: 9871 → 11845 Silver: 8785 → 7028 Behemoth Crystal: 9871 → 11845 Silver: 8785 → 7028 Ancient Ent Crystal: 8732 → 10479 Silver: 7772 → 6217 Goliath Horseeater Crystal: 7593 → 9112 Silver: 6758 → 5406 Roving Bastion Crystal: 10441 → 12529 Silver: 9292 → 7434 Juggernaut Crystal: 10251 → 12301 Silver: 9123 → 7299 Phalanx Beetle Crystal: 9491 → 11390 Silver: 8447 → 6758

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous 2v2 Hellgates Healing Reduction: 20% → 30% Mists (Solo and Greater) Healing Reduction: 20% → 30%

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Adjusted Mists local maps so that exits are always visible
Fixed issue where party order would reset on zone change and party roles would not update for new members
Fixed rare issue where laborer rewards could disappear when clicking away too quickly
Rejuvenating Flower (Nature Staff) is no longer destroyed by enemies walking over it
Nature Staff spells that apply multiple Rejuvenation Stacks simultaneously now only trigger the initial heal once (Rejuvenating Flower, Rejuvenating Breeze)
Fixed issue where Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) could activate twice with high attack speeds
Whirling Strike and Gale Dance (Quarterstaff) now apply cooldown reduction buff when first hit misses or third hit kills target

items.text: Resolved issues affecting the Fishing minigame on devices with low performance
Fixed issue where getting disconnected for too long in Arena could trigger overburdened debuff
Fixed issue where, when catching fish with full inventory, loot bag would be dropped in the water
Lymhurst Direboar Piglets are no longer vegetarian
The debuff that reduced Health Regeneration to 50%, caused by Poison areas in Veteran Hidden Keeps, no longer lasts 60 minutes and now falls off when leaving the area

subitems.text: Fixed issue where aiming a spell's direction while channeling could be unresponsive
Fixed issue where characters could be moved when they should be blocked by UI
Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) now targets allies instead of enemies on mobile

items.text: Additional graphical, UI, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
